testing_centers.notes: In-person and online proctored via Kryterion Webassessor

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name must match Webassessor registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. No access to Salesforce org. Proctor monitors via webcam.
renewal_options: Salesforce releases three major updates per year. For each release, certified professionals must complete a free maintenance module on Trailhead to retain their certification. No cost for maintenance.
target_audience: Consultants who have experience implementing Salesforce for Education solutions
recommended_experience: 2+ years of Salesforce Platform experience, 1+ years of Salesforce implementation experience in the education industry, implemented and supported at least one project involving Education Cloud

retake_policy.notes: Retake available after scheduling (no mandatory waiting period for first retake). Retake fee ~$100 for most exams.

objectives.title: Determine the solution set that satisfies customer requirements (marketing and engagement, recruitment and admissions, student experience, and advancement and alumni relations)
Explain the Education Cloud solution for K-12 customers
Discuss the capabilities and considerations of Education Cloud, including compatibility with other Salesforce products and features
Install and configure Salesforce for Education solutions
Facilitate a successful implementation (plan, gather requirements, design, build, test, document, deploy, and optimize)
Illustrate governance, change management, staffing, implementation strategies, deployment considerations, and adoption best practices including community resources for long-term solution success
Evaluate the similarities, differences, and relationships between Salesforce for Education solutions account model considerations and standard Salesforce Account-Contact data models
Design an appropriate and scalable solution for education customers
Locate community and open-source solutions and resources
Decide when to use Education Cloud, other Salesforce solutions, community open source solutions, and third-party applications
Evaluate integration considerations for connecting systems in an Education Cloud implementation
Explain data management considerations (data usage, forecasting, large data volumes, migrations in Education Cloud)
Distinguish between reporting solutions in Education Cloud
Demonstrate when a data analytics solution is appropriate

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Trailhead
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning platform with trails aligned to each certification

official_study_resources.title: Salesforce Exam Guide & Sample Questions
official_study_resources.notes: Free exam guides with sample questions on each credential page
